data.title: Spectral Medical Inc. (TSX: EDT) released Q2 financials and corporate update for therapeutic solutions in sepsis.
data.description: Spectral Medical Inc., a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol EDT, based in Toronto, released its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Specializing in therapeutics for sepsis and septic shock, Spectral is in its late-stage development phase. Along with the financial report, the company also shared a corporate update as of August 8, 2025.

data.title: First American Uranium is swapping shares for debt, with details undisclosed. Restricted from dissemination in the US.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States or through U.S. newswire services.

data.title: Clarivate to present at Oppenheimer conference on August 13. CEO & CFO will be speaking. $CLVT.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in London, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a prominent global provider of transformative intelligence, disclosed that Matti Shem Tov, the CEO, and Jonathan Collins, the Executive Vice President and CFO, are set to speak at an event.

data.title: Alpha reported Q2 net loss of $5.0M, $46.1M Adjusted EBITDA, $556.9M liquidity. Improved cost of coal sales, lowers guidance to $101 per ton.
data.description: In the second quarter, a net loss of $5.0 million was reported, alongside an Adjusted EBITDA of $46.1 million. As of June 30, total liquidity reached $556.9 million. The company also achieved its best quarterly cost of coal sales performance since 2021. Moreover, they reduced the 2025 cost of coal sales guidance range to $101 per unit, indicating a positive trend towards cost management.

data.title: Standard Chartered and Animoca Brands partner to apply for Hong Kong stablecoin license in "Anchorpoint" venture.
data.description: The joint venture called "Anchorpoint" is seeking to take advantage of Hong Kong's recently implemented stablecoin licensing system.

data.title: PAR Technology Corp. reports a strong Q2 in 2025, with record multi-product logo signings and largest company-wide performance improvements. CEO Savneet Singh highlights the success.
data.description: In New Hartford, NY, PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) released their financial report for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025. CEO Savneet Singh highlighted the success of the quarter, noting a record number of multi-product logos signed and the recommencement of their largest rollout. The company also closed the quarter with its highest company-wide pi.

data.title: Soho House & Co Inc. reported Q2 2025 total revenues of $329.8M, with membership revenues at $118.6M, a 15.9% increase.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO) shared their results for the second quarter of 2025. The highlights include total revenues reaching $329.8 million, marking an 8.9% increase compared to the previous year. Membership revenues also saw significant growth, reaching $118.6 million, a 15.9% year-over-year increase. In-House revenues amounted to $132.5 million, showing a 4.1% rise from the previous year. These numbers reflect the company's continuous efforts to expand their global membership platform and cater to a diverse range of members.

data.title: Sotera Health's Q2 2025: Net revenues up 6.4% at $294M, Adjusted EBITDA up 9.8% at $151M. Raised full-year outlook. Sterigenics, Nordion, and Nelson Labs segments also saw revenue growth. Total debt at $2.3B, Net Leverage Ratio improved to 3.5x. Full-year 2025 outlook updated. Non-GAAP financial measures used. Safety health solutions provider reports strong financial results.
data.description: Sotera Health Company reported Q2 2025 net revenues of $294 million, a 6.4% increase from Q2 2024, with adjusted EBITDA up 9.8% to $151 million. Net income was $8 million compared to $9 million in Q2 2024. The company raised its full-year 2025 revenue outlook to 4.5%-6.0% and adjusted EBITDA outlook to 6.0%-7.5%. Sterigenics reported a 10.5% increase in net revenue in Q2 2025 to $195 million. Nordion's net revenue increased 2.9% to $42 million in Q2 2025, and Nelson Labs saw a 3.3% decrease in net revenue to $57 million. Sotera Health had $2.3 billion in total debt as of June 30, 2025, and the Net Leverage Ratio improved to 3.5x. The company's 2025 outlook includes a range of metrics such as net revenue growth, adjusted EBITDA growth, interest expense, tax rate, adjusted EPS, and capital expenditures. Sotera Health provided non-GAAP financial measures to supplement their results, and noted forward-looking statements may be subject to risks and uncertainties.

data.title: Fiera Capital's Q2 2025 results show AUM at $160.5B, total revenues of $162,974K, Adjusted EBITDA at $45,692K, and net earnings at $3,757K.
data.description: Fiera Capital Corporation reported its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2025. The end of period Assets Under Management (AUM) was $160.5 billion. Total revenues were $162,974, with base management fees at $147,867 and performance fees at $2,491. Net earnings were $3,757. Adjusted EBITDA was $45,692, with adjusted net earnings at $27,198. The company saw growth in its Private Markets platform, reaching nearly $21 billion in AUM. The company repurchased 1.1 million shares and approved a dividend of 10.8 cents per share. Institutional AUM was $92,108, Financial Intermediaries AUM was $54,632, and Private Wealth AUM was $13,734. Public Markets AUM was $103,797, and Private Markets AUM was $20,853. The financial article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Exodus partners with Superstate to expand blockchains for common stock tokens, representing Class A shares digitally.
data.description: Exodus Movement, Inc., a renowned self-custodial cryptocurrency platform traded on NYSE American under the ticker symbol EXOD, has disclosed its collaboration with Superstate on Aug. 08, 2025. The partnership aims to develop common stock tokens that will digitally mirror Exodus’ Class A shares on prominent public blockchains.

data.title: Join DFDS' teleconference discussing Q2 2025 results, mark your calendar!
data.description: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest level in the past decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement compared to the previous year when the rate was at 6.2%. Additionally, it was noted that the number of new jobs created in the last month reached 250,000, showcasing a robust growth in the labor market. The strong performance was attributed to various sectors such as technology, healthcare, and manufacturing, which have been driving the job market expansion. Economists predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, indicating a promising outlook for the economy.

data.title: MAC Copper Limited receives SARB approval on acquisition by Harmony Gold; NYSE:MTAL, ASX:MAC; Harmony Gold to acquire 100% of MAC's shares.
data.description: In St. Helier, Jersey, MAC Copper Limited, listed as (NYSE: MTAL; ASX: MAC) ARBN 671 963 198, has announced the progress of its acquisition by Harmony Gold (Australia) Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited (JSE: HAR, NYSE: HMY). Harmony is set to purchase 100% of MAC's issued share capital through a Jersey law scheme of arrangement under Article 125 of the Companies Act. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for MAC and Harmony Gold, with the deal involving substantial financial transactions. The acquisition process is currently underway, paving the way for potential growth and expansion opportunities for both companies involved.

data.title: Asia Halal Food Market to reach $2.05 trillion by 2033, from $929.48 billion in 2024, with CAGR of 9.22% due to rising awareness and globalization.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report titled "Asia Halal Food Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report indicates that the Asia Halal Food Market is projected to grow significantly, with an estimated value of US$2.05 trillion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$929.48 billion recorded in 2024. This growth is expected to be driven by a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.22% from 2025 to 2033. Factors contributing to this expansion include heightened public awareness, rapid globalization and diversification, adherence to stringent standards, the proliferation of e-commerce platforms, and mounting concerns.

data.title: Natural Grocers celebrates 70th anniversary with limited-edition Pecan Caramel Pie Coffee, on sale Aug. 14-16.
data.description: A new Fair Trade Certified™ and organic house blend is combining disco vibes with decadence. Available for purchase from August 14 to 16 in Lakewood, Colorado, this groovy brew is a part of the celebrations marking 70 years of goodness from Natural Grocers®. This special blend promises a unique flavor experience to customers, serving up a memorable taste that resonates perfectly.
